Because the available grounded evidence in this research record only supports the founding of SpaceX and does not yet substantiate specific Falcon 1 program milestones (such as exact launch dates, causes of failures, first successful orbit, NASA contract details, or retirement timeline), I cannot reliably provide those additional details with proper citations from fetched sources.

- Founder of SpaceX: Elon Musk
- Year founded: 2002
